nodes.name: Webhook Debug
nodes.notes: [ML-CAPTURA] Endpoint manual: POST /ml/captura/debug. Body opcional: { janela_horas: 2, numero_whatsapp: '551699...' }

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_mensagens,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '{{ $json.body.janela_horas || 2 }} hours') AS mensagens_recentes,
  MAX(created_at) AS ultima_mensagem,
  COUNT(DISTINCT remote_jid) AS contatos_unicos,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tipo = 'audio') AS audios,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tipo = 'text') AS textos
FROM ml_captura.mensagens_raw
WHERE ('{{ $('Webhook Debug').first().json.body.numero_whatsapp || '' }}' = '' OR session_id LIKE '%{{ $('Webhook Debug').first().json.body.numero_whatsapp || '' }}%')

nodes.name: Stats Mensagens
nodes.notes: Contagens de mensagens_raw — total, recentes, por tipo

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_sessoes,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ativa') AS sessoes_ativas,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE agente_humano_id IS NULL) AS sem_agente,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE agente_humano_id IS NOT NULL) AS com_agente,
  MAX(updated_at) AS ultima_atualizacao
FROM ml_captura.sessoes_conversa

nodes.name: Stats Sessoes
nodes.notes: Contagens de sessoes_conversa — total, ativas, vinculo com agente

parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.nome AS agente_nome,
  COUNT(s.id) AS total_sessoes,
  MAX(s.updated_at) AS ultima_atividade
FROM _plataforma.agentes_humanos a
LEFT JOIN ml_captura.sessoes_conversa s ON s.agente_humano_id = a.id
GROUP BY a.id, a.nome
ORDER BY total_sessoes DESC

nodes.name: Stats Agentes
nodes.notes: Sessoes por agente humano — identifica numeros sem vinculo

nodes.name: Gerar Diagnostico
nodes.notes: Consolida stats e gera diagnostico com alertas automaticos

nodes.name: Respond Diagnostico
nodes.notes: Retorna JSON formatado com diagnostico completo
